# Beta Knowledge

The **beta** topic. Beta shares terminology with alpha and gamma but
covers a slightly different scope. This page is the canonical entry
for beta-related questions.

For related concepts see [/concepts/alpha.md](/concepts/alpha.md) and
[/concepts/gamma.md](/concepts/gamma.md).
